{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Commandment
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Commandment]] is an [[Iteration]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c1">''Bloodline'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
